campaigns.label: Official Website Updates
campaigns.description: The main site will be the primary public path for release news and updates while plans are finalized.

campaigns.label: Trailer & Release Updates
campaigns.description: The trailer section and the main site remain the current public path while release plans are finalized.

supporters.label: Patreon
supporters.description: Bonus material, closer updates, a community space, and a direct way to back the film financially. Join the journey on Patreon for exclusive content and early access to updates.

supporters.label: YouTube Channel
supporters.description: Trailer drops, feature clips, and longer-form video updates. Subscribe to the YouTube channel to catch all the video content as soon as it is released.

supporters.label: Instagram
supporters.description: Short-form updates, stills, and behind-the-scenes moments from the film. Follow on Instagram for a more casual, visual look at the film journey and moments that do not make it into the trailers.

supporters.label: TikTok
supporters.description: Quick clips, trailer moments, and audience-facing campaign posts. Follow on TikTok for a more playful, quick-hit look at the film and its community.

supporters.label: Discord
supporters.description: A community space for fans to discuss the film, share content, and connect with the team. Join the Discord to be part of the conversation and connect with other fans.

page.title: Patreon & Supporter Access
page.intro: Bonus material, closer updates, a community space, and a direct way to back the film financially. Join the journey on Patreon for exclusive content and early access to updates.
page.membership_pitch: Road footage, podcasts, and alternate cuts for a smaller audience that wants more personal updates and a direct way to back the film financially.

benefits.title: Main Movie Access
benefits.description: A dedicated place to announce supporter-first access windows and early digital updates.

benefits.title: Texas Podcast Material
benefits.description: A home for road-trip conversations and long-form audio that expands the documentary world.

benefits.title: Driving Footage & Music Cuts
benefits.description: Extended driving sequences, alternate edits, and atmospheric material for fans.

benefits.title: Discord Or Bonus Conversations
benefits.description: Flexible space for extra recordings, live chats, or community-driven add-ons.

tiers.name: Roadside Supporter
tiers.description: Best for followers who want release updates, bonus posts, and a simple way to back the project.

tiers.name: Tour Companion
tiers.description: Adds deeper bonus material, behind-the-scenes drops, and more of the in-progress documentary world.

tiers.name: Producer Circle
tiers.description: Reserved for the most engaged backers who want fuller access to updates and extended extras, also includes a special thank-you credit in the film and on the website.
